title: World Bank Commodity Price Data (The Pink Sheet) — Annual historical prices
countries: N/A (world commodity benchmark prices, not country-level)
units: nominal and real (constant US dollars) prices; per-commodity units in header rows and Description sheet
license_terms: World Bank terms of use (CC BY-4.0 open data terms)
notes: July 2026 edition of the Pink Sheet historical annual workbook. Sheets: Annual Prices (Nominal), Annual Indices (Nominal), Annual Prices (Real), Annual Indices (Real), Description, Definitions, Index Weights. Poultry is labelled 'Chicken' (Meat, chicken); orange prices under 'Orange'. Real-price sheets are deflated (MUV index). Link discovered from the Commodity Markets research page on 2026-07-12; the thedocs.worldbank.org path segment changes with each monthly edition.
